series_metadata.series_description: A record of the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) adjustments that document the Agency’s funding expenditures and modifications to chart-fields. File includes, but is not limited to, a description of the adjustment and the appropriate coding needed for the adjustment. Information is electronically forwarded for entering into the Ohio Administrative Knowledge System (OAKS the State of Ohio’s accounting system).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronic version for at least 7 years after the grant liquidation period expires and then destroy provided state and federal audits are completed, audit reports are released, and all discrepancies are resolved., Electronic: Delete
